channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: US strikes Iran again as it tries to limit attacks on ships on the Strait of Hormuz - AP News
item.description:
1. US strikes Iran again as it tries to limit attacks on ships on the Strait of Hormuz  AP News
  2. Iran Live Updates: After Intense U.S. Strikes, Iran Targets Gulf States and Claims Strait is Closed  The New York Times
  3. US military confirms beginning a new wave of strikes in Iran  The Times of Israel
  4. Live updates: U.S. conducts another round of strikes on Iran as Trump, supreme leader exchange threats  CBS News
  5. Iran expands attacks on Gulf states after intense US strikes  France 24
